seo.feature_1_text: Our servers automatically delete your files after conversion. Your data is never stored permanently.
seo.feature_2_text: We use cutting-edge technology to ensure your photos are processed in milliseconds.
seo.faq_1_a: Yes, MediaConvert.net is 100% free. There are no hidden fees or abusive limits.
seo.faq_2_a: We support JPG, PNG, WEBP, TIFF, GIF, BMP, and ICO. We use ImageMagick to ensure the best color fidelity.

termos.title: Terms of Use
termos.content:
1. Acceptance of Terms

By using MediaConvert.net, you agree to comply with these terms of service. Our tool is designed for ethical and legal image conversion.

2. User Responsibility

The user is solely responsible for the uploaded files. Using the tool to process illegal content or content that violates third-party copyrights is not permitted.

3. Disclaimer of Warranties

The service is provided 'as is'. Although we use high-fidelity technology, we do not guarantee that the conversion result will perfectly meet the specific expectations of every professional project.

4. Data Cleanup

For your security, all files are deleted from our servers 30 minutes after upload via an automated routine.

privacidade.title: Privacy Policy
privacidade.content:
1. Commitment to Privacy

Privacy is the pillar of MediaConvert.net. We do not collect, view, or share images uploaded by users.

2. Data Processing

Processing occurs temporarily. We use the ImageMagick library for technical conversion, and the resulting file is only available to the user who performed the upload.

3. Cookies and Logs

We use strictly necessary cookies to maintain your language preference and anonymous server logs to monitor system health and prevent abuse (DDoS).

4. GDPR

In compliance with General Data Protection regulations, we guarantee that no sensitive personal data is stored in our databases.

footer.description: The fastest and most secure tool to convert your photos online. Professional processing and guaranteed privacy.
